commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=7175ea036f3de95a5993f0555d41afbaba52ee41)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds iMessage private-API status-message propagation and changes the default OpenClaw-side iMessage send timeout to 150 seconds.

PR surface: Source +28, Tests +46. Total +74 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection for the timeout layering: current OpenClaw sends can inherit the 10s RPC client timeout, and upstream `imsg` bridge sends also have a separate 10s default. I did not reproduce the macOS 26 stall on a live Mac.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainer or author needs to decide whether to update the upstream `imsg` timeout contract, narrow this PR to diagnostics, or accept the longer OpenClaw wait as only a partial mitigation.

target.title: fix(imessage): self-explaining private-API failures and dedicated send timeout
target.body:
## Summary

Two macOS-26-resilience fixes for the iMessage channel:

1. **Surface *why* the private API is unavailable.** The probe now carries imsg's own `status --json` `message` (SIP / library validation / macOS 26 AMFI gate) into `IMessagePrivateApiStatus.statusMessage`, and blocked actions append it. Operators on macOS 26.5 stop getting the misleading "run imsg launch" with no reason.

2. **Decouple the send timeout from the probe timeout.** Sends inherited the 10s probe default via `client.request`. On macOS 26 the private-API bridge intermittently stalls up to ~124s; the 10s abort dropped attachment/reply sends (non-recoverable shapes). New `DEFAULT_IMESSAGE_SEND_TIMEOUT_MS = 150_000` for sends only (covers the observed upper bound + headroom); probes/health checks stay fast. **No new config surface** — explicit opts/`probeTimeoutMs` still win. Mirrors the BlueBubbles send-timeout fix (#69193).

## Verification

- `pnpm tsgo:extensions` clean.
- Full imessage extension suite: **548 tests pass**, incl. 2 new tests (statusMessage propagation; 150s send default).
- Codex `$autoreview` clean (it caught an initial 60s-too-short default vs the documented 124s stall window; fixed to 150s).
- **Live regression smoke on macOS 26.4.1 (lobster):** built 2026.6.1 + this fix, deployed to the gateway, restarted (PID bounced), iMessage + Telegram both healthy, no startup errors. Edge-case paths (blocked-action statusMessage, stalled send) don't fire in normal operation, so they're covered by unit tests rather than the live smoke.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
target.author: omarshahine
